table.title: KYC applications
table.sub_title: You can manage the list of KYC applications available in the system.

empty.title: No KYC applications received yet.
empty.message: Once received, you can approve, review, or reject them as needed.

messages.reject_request_message: Rejecting this carrier will deny their access. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?
messages.approve_request_message: Approving this carrier will give them access to the system. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?
messages.success_approve: The access request has been successfully approved.
messages.success_reject: The access request has been successfully rejected.

labels.empty_title: There are currently no data available.

messages.success: The review request has been sent successfully.
